PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?durationInMinutes WHERE {
  VALUES ?series {
    wd:Q3511178 wd:Q14870260 wd:Q56692089
  }
  ?game wdt:P2107 ?series .
  ?game wdt:P527 wd:Q13927 .
  ?game wdt:P2047 ?duration .
  ?duration wdt:P1192 ?durationValue .
  ?duration wdt:P2159 wd:P2128 .
  BIND(?durationValue AS ?durationInMinutes)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?durationInMinutes)
LIMIT 1

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

SELECT ?durationInMinutes
WHERE {
  VALUES ?series { wd:Q3511178 wd:Q14870260 wd:Q56692089 }
  ?game wdt:P2107 ?series .
  ?game wdt:P527 wd:Q13927 .
  ?game wdt:P2047 ?duration .
  ?duration wdt:P1192 ?durationValue .
  ?duration wdt:P2159 wd:P2128 .
  BIND(?durationValue AS ?durationInMinutes)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?durationInMinutes)
LIMIT 1
